recent_bad_license_projects.name: bzfs
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: bzfs is a reliable near real-time, parallel replication and backup command-line tool for ZFS. It replicates snapshots from many local or remote source ZFS datasets (and their descendants) to local or remote destination datasets, using zfs send/receive and ssh, and can operate at sub-second intervals across large fleets of hosts.
